title: U.S. revokes Iran oil sales authorization after tanker attacks
summary_full: Treasury had waived sanctions on Iranian oil through Aug. 21 after Washington and Tehran inked an interim deal to reopen Hormuz last month.
summary_public: Treasury had waived sanctions on Iranian oil through Aug. 21 after Washington and Tehran inked an interim deal to reopen Hormuz last month.

IR.label: positive
